feed.description: Photography conversations: craft, storytelling, workflow, and making images under real constraints.
feed.title: Frame & Light

bullets: Welcome back to Frame & Light. Today we're talking about underwater photography, and I'm joined by Ava Lemoine, underwater photographer. Ava Lemoine, thanks for being here.
Thanks, Leo. Excited for this one — underwater imaging is something I've been thinking about a lot.
Let's start there. What's the structural angle most listeners don't have access to?
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Frame & Light. Today we're talking about underwater photography, and I'm joined by Ava Lemoine, underwater photographer. Ava Lemoine, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Underwater Images That Feel Alive
